images.prompt: Which image best represents Hagar by the spring in the wilderness?

reasons.hagar-spring-wilderness.png: Shows the clearest scene of a woman by a spring in the wilderness, matching Genesis 16 directly.
reasons.desert-water-spring.png: Represents the wilderness spring but leaves out Hagar herself.
reasons.tent-camp-wilderness.png: Suggests an ancient camp setting but not the spring encounter.
reasons.road-to-egypt.png: Suggests wilderness travel direction, but not Hagar by the water source.

images.prompt: Which image best represents Abraham receiving visitors near Mamre?

reasons.abraham-visitors-mamre.png: Shows the three visitors arriving near a tent under the oaks, which matches Genesis 18 most directly.
reasons.tent-meal-visitors.png: Represents Abraham's hospitality meal, but not the initial arrival scene.
reasons.sodom-distant-plain.png: Represents the later direction toward Sodom rather than the visit at Mamre.
reasons.oaks-of-mamre.png: Represents the place itself, but not Abraham receiving the three visitors.
